title: Design repository RAG architecture and implementation plan
notes: Design doc in docs/plans/2026-03-07-repository-rag-design.md; implementation plan in docs/plans/2026-03-07-repository-rag-implementation-plan.md; runtime workflow enforcement remains external to rarag; workflow-phase-aware retrieval was removed from runtime scope in favor of query modes plus snapshot-local repository-state signals; implementation now removes phase inputs from rarag-core; rarag; raragd; and rarag-mcp request contracts and renames workflow_hints storage fields to repository_state_hints; follow-up hardening fixed latest-snapshot worktree resolution; endpoint-backed Qdrant usage; distinct daemon/MCP socket defaults; and added an opt-in live OpenAI plus Qdrant pre-merge check; documented Qdrant runtime setup in docs/ops/qdrant-runtime.md

title: Plan repository RAG spec-compatibility fixes
